records.ety: [L., fr. Gr. <?/ a thing subject to some obligation, fr. <?/ to put under, put down, pledge. See Hypothesis.]

defs: An obligation by which property of a debtor was made over to his creditor in security of his debt.
notes: ☞ It differed from pledge in regard to possession of the property subject to the obligation; pledge requiring, simple hypotheca not requiring, possession of it by the creditor. The modern mortgage corresponds very closely with it.
